detail.description: Joey Meneses singles on a line drive to left fielder Teoscar Hernández.
Joey Meneses grounds out, shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
Joey Meneses grounds out, third baseman Tommy Edman to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
Joey Meneses flies out to center fielder Jose Siri.

Joey Meneses grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Christian Moore to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd. Jonah Heim out at 2nd. Joey Meneses out at 1st.
Joey Meneses singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler. Jacob Wilson scores. Tyler Soderstrom to 2nd.
Joey Meneses out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Josh Lowe. Jeff McNeil scores. Alika Williams to 3rd.
Joey Meneses grounds out sharply, third baseman Denzer Guzman to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.
Joey Meneses grounds out sharply, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.
Joey Meneses pops out to third baseman Denzer Guzman.
Joey Meneses grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Carlos Cortes out at 2nd. Joey Meneses out at 1st.
Joey Meneses singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Shea Langeliers to 3rd. Jonah Heim to 2nd.
Joey Meneses grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Joey Meneses out at 1st.
Joey Meneses flies out to right fielder Braden Montgomery.
Joey Meneses pops out to first baseman Bryce Eldridge.
Joey Meneses grounds out, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Bryce Eldridge.
Joey Meneses grounds out, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers.
